---
title: "Map Layers"
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/"
)
library(toro)
```

There are several types of layers in toro:

- Line
- Fill
- Circle
- Symbol
- Text

For more in depth examples see the layers portion of the Examples section.


These layers all use GeoJSON data sources to display TODO
